artifact_classes.stores: goals, success criteria, failure criteria, constraints, risk boundaries
plan graphs, strategy templates, route plans, playbooks
skills, tools, reusable procedures, capability recipes
permissions, vetoes, rollback rules, risk limits, approval rules
rubrics, tests, negative controls, holdouts, verifier criteria
execution bundles, runtime decisions, tool sequences
proof traces, scores, costs, failures, successes, credit assignment
candidate upgrades, canary verdicts, propagated releases, rollback receipts

canonical_language.headline: Aim. Act. Prove. Evolve.
lines: The Proof Gradient gives it evolution.
The Artifact Vault stores reusable intelligence.
The Run Fabric executes agents at scale.
The Proof Ledger records what happened.
The Selection Gate promotes only what proved itself.
canonical_language.public_thesis: Every job leaves proof. Every proof can compound intelligence.

category_definition: Proof Gradient is not an agent framework. It is a proof-carrying intelligence protocol for governed agent evolution.

goals.direction: Every run begins with explicit aim, success criteria, failure criteria, constraints, and policy boundaries.
goals.name: Direction Integrity
goals.why: A network cannot evolve safely if it cannot state what it is trying to do.

goals.direction: Every run resolves an inspectable plan graph before execution.
goals.name: Strategy Fidelity
goals.why: Strategy must be replayable so proof can explain why an outcome happened.

goals.direction: Reusable procedures become signed, scoped, versioned capability artifacts.
goals.name: Capability Reuse
goals.why: The network compounds only when useful capability can be reused.

goals.direction: Every execution emits trace, score, cost, latency, policy decisions, errors, and credit assignment.
goals.name: Proof Completeness
goals.why: Without proof, learning is mythology; with proof, learning becomes infrastructure.

goals.direction: Only upgrades that pass evaluation, negative controls, canary, monitoring, and rollback can propagate.
goals.name: Selection Discipline
goals.why: Evolution must be earned by proof, not by confidence or momentum.

goals.direction: Every propagated artifact has a rollback route, owner, scope, and monitoring plan.
goals.name: Rollback Sovereignty
goals.why: A network that cannot reverse upgrades cannot be trusted to evolve.

goals.direction: Every proof has a permanent page, JSON evidence, checksum, and link back to the main command center.
goals.name: Public Evidence
goals.why: The public proof system must remain inspectable, non-technical, and durable.

do_not_say: Every job magically makes the agent smarter.
One agent learns and all agents automatically level up.
We have achieved Kardashev Type II capability.
do_say: Every job leaves proof. Every proof compounds intelligence.
One agent proves. The network improves.
No proof, no evolution. No eval, no propagation. No rollback, no release.
Kardashev-scale ambition is a strategic scenario.

plans.name: Commit Standardization Plan
plans.risk_budget: No execution without a complete commit.
plans.strategy: Turn every job into a structured commitment before execution.

plans.name: Artifact Resolution Plan
plans.strategy: Resolve the exact goals, plans, skills, tools, policies, evals, and context needed for each run.

plans.name: Proof Ledger Plan
plans.risk_budget: No proof means no learning claim.
plans.strategy: Capture every execution as append-only evidence.

plans.name: Evolution Gate Plan
plans.strategy: Convert proof into upgrades only through evaluation, approval, canary, monitoring, and rollback.

plans.name: Negative-Control Discipline Plan
plans.strategy: Inject attractive but false upgrades to test that the Selection Gate rejects proxy games.

plans.name: Proof Archive Plan
plans.risk_budget: No missing links in public proof pages.
plans.strategy: Ensure every proof has a durable page, JSON evidence, checksum, and command-center backlink.

plans.name: Additive Expansion Plan
plans.risk_budget: No destructive removal unless absolutely necessary.
plans.strategy: Expand SkillOS without deleting existing proofs, receipts, reports, badges, workflows, or pages.

required_files: link back to main command center

skills.input_signal: job request, policy, risk, success criteria
skills.name: Commit Compiler
skills.purpose: Turns a job into a structured commitment with goals, constraints, budget, evals, and approval rules.

skills.name: Goal Artifact Curator
skills.purpose: Stores, versions, scopes, and signs direction artifacts.

skills.name: Plan Graph Resolver
skills.purpose: Builds replayable plan graphs for agent execution.

skills.input_signal: plan graph, capability requirement, skill registry
skills.name: Skill Resolver
skills.purpose: Selects verified skills needed by the execution bundle.

skills.name: Policy Binder
skills.purpose: Binds permissions, risk limits, rollback rules, and human approvals to runtime.

skills.name: Run Fabric Executor
skills.purpose: Executes agents at scale with stateless runtime resolution and proof emission.

skills.name: Proof Trace Capture
skills.purpose: Records trace, score, feedback, costs, latency, errors, policy decisions, and tool history.

skills.input_signal: proof trace, evaluator result, human feedback
skills.name: Credit Assignment
skills.purpose: Identifies which artifacts contributed to success, failure, cost, or risk.

skills.input_signal: proof trace, failure modes, attribution map
skills.name: Upgrade Proposal Generator
skills.purpose: Turns proof and credit assignment into candidate improvements.

skills.input_signal: upgrade proposal, eval results, risk score
skills.name: Selection Gate Judge
skills.purpose: Promotes only upgrades that passed evaluation, approval, canary, monitoring, scope, and rollback.

skills.name: Canary Release Manager
skills.purpose: Tests approved upgrades in limited scope before broader propagation.

skills.input_signal: artifact diff, affected agents, risk register
skills.name: Rollback Planner
skills.purpose: Ensures every propagated artifact can be reversed or contained.

skills.name: Negative-Control Generator
skills.purpose: Creates attractive false improvements to test selection discipline.

skills.input_signal: released goals, plans, skills, tools, policies, evals
skills.name: Artifact Vault Curator
skills.purpose: Stores reusable intelligence as immutable, versioned, scoped, signed, auditable artifacts.

skills.input_signal: generated pages, receipts, registry, source protocol
skills.name: Command Center Integrator
skills.purpose: Adds protocol pages, proof archive entries, manifests, badges, and backlinks without removing existing evidence.

skills.input_signal: source protocol, goals, plans, skills, metrics
skills.name: Executive Evidence Renderer
skills.purpose: Explains Proof-Carrying Intelligence to non-technical viewers with cards, tables, graphs, and safe claims.
